variants: Manoj Pratihar is an occupational therapist, dedicated to improving the lives of his clients through specialized care. He holds a Labyrinth Cartographer Accreditation, enhancing his skills in spatial planning for therapeutic environments. Manoj is also an active member of the Mistvale Bassists Collective, where he shares his passion for music with like-minded individuals. His professional journey was guided by his mentor, Chantelle Lemoine, who provided invaluable insights in his field. Manoj’s work and initiatives have been supported by the Magpie Arc Fund, which aligns with his commitment to occupational therapy.
